inputs.label: Upstream Mach Number (M1)
inputs.businessContext: Mach number before the expansion fan

businessContext_i18n.en: Mach number before the expansion fan
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de Mach avant l'éventail de détente
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de Mach antes del abanico de expansión

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (γ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats for the gas (e.g., 1.4 for air)

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of specific heats for the gas (e.g., 1.4 for air)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gazın özgül ısı oranı (örneğin hava için 1.4)
businessContext_i18n.de: Isentropenexponent des Gases (z. B. 1,4 für Luft)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport des chaleurs spécifiques du gaz (ex. 1,4 pour l'air)
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de calores específicos del gas (ej., 1.4 para aire)

inputs.label: Flow Deflection Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle through which the flow is turned (positive for expansion)

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle through which the flow is turned (positive for expansion)
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel, um den die Strömung umgelenkt wird (positiv für Expansion)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de rotation de l'écoulement (positif pour une détente)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de giro del flujo (positivo para expansión)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Deflection angle must be between 0 and 90 degrees
